title: Intense Earthy Brazilian Russet Potato Hash
description: A hearty solo dinner dish featuring russet potatoes, pickle, and high protein ingredients, showcasing earthy and molten flavors of Brazilian cuisine
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine diced potatoes, chopped onion, and minced garlic, and toss with olive oil, salt, and pepper until they are evenly coated.
Spread the potato mixture on a baking sheet and roast in the oven for 20 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender and lightly browned.
While the potatoes are roasting, cook the sliced chicken sausage in a large skillet over medium heat, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks, until it is no longer pink, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the chopped pickle, cooked black beans, and roasted potato mixture to the skillet with the chicken sausage, and stir to combine.
Make a well in the center of the potato mixture and pour in the beaten egg, scrambling it into the potatoes as it cooks.
Continue cooking the potato mixture for an additional 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly, until the egg is fully cooked and the mixture is heated through.
Serve the intense earthy Brazilian russet potato hash hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
